usage: editAdjust [-help] [-adjust_size] -refer_obj {top bottom left right} {[-align_edge {left center right top middle bottom diag45_top diag45_middle diag45_bottom diag135_top diag135_middle diag135_bottom}]  [-space_mode {horizontal vertical dist_horizontal dist_vertical diag45 diag135 dist_diag45 dist_diag135} [-space <float>]]}

options.name: -adjust_size
options.description: Specifies whether to adjust size of objects.

options.name: -align_edge
options.description: {left center right top middle bottom diag45_top diag45_middle diag45_bottom diag135_top diag135_middle diag135_bottom} Specifies the side of edge of wires to align.

options.name: -refer_obj
options.description: Specifies the obj of refer when align.

options.name: -space_mode
options.description: {horizontal vertical dist_horizontal dist_vertical diag45 diag135 dist_diag45 dist_diag135} Specifies whether work on space mode.
